evals.prompt: Fetch this JSTOR article without getting blocked by their bot detection
Scrape Google Scholar results for Minoan trade routes
expectations: Uses obscura fetch --stealth for Google Scholar
Extracts result titles and citation counts

evals.prompt: I need a stealth headless browser to grab metadata from this academic page
expectations: Performs page fetch with --eval for metadata extraction

evals.prompt: Extract metadata from this Elsevier article page without being detected as a bot
expectations: Returns title, authors, abstract if available

evals.prompt: Batch scrape these 10 academic URLs with anti-fingerprinting protection
expectations: Handles multiple URLs with appropriate concurrency

evals.prompt: Search ArXiv for attention mechanism papers published in 2025
expectations: Uses ArXiv MCP or Exa, not Obscura
ArXiv does not require stealth browsing

evals.prompt: Read this PDF file and summarize the key findings
expectations: PDF reading does not require a headless browser
Uses Read tool or PDF-specific tool

evals.prompt: Find papers similar to this one using Exa search
expectations: No stealth browsing needed for Exa

evals.prompt: Download this ArXiv paper and analyze it
expectations: ArXiv is open access, no stealth needed

evals.prompt: Scrape this Reddit thread about machine learning papers
expectations: Obscura is not the right tool for Reddit
